description: Longines Churchill Distaff Turf Mile S. - FOR FILLIES AND MARES, FOUR YEARS OLD AND UPWARD.

timeform.analystVerdict: This doesn't look the deepest Group Two. PIN UP BETTY ought to go well and is the selection. Classic Q has the rider for the big occasion up and can come out best of the remainder. Movin' On Up can't be ruled out of it either.
